answer_evidence: def is_palindrome(s):\n    filtered = ''.join(ch.lower() for ch in s if ch.isalnum())\n    return filtered == filtered[::-1]
This removes punctuation/spaces and lowercases everything. Time complexity is O(n). Example: 'A man, a plan, a canal: Panama' returns True.
reasoning_summary: The student's answer correctly implements the palindrome check, handles case, spaces, and punctuation, explains O(n) time complexity, and provides a clear example, satisfying all rubric criteria for full credit.
